description: Relay of an OFFICIAL warning issued by an authoritative agency, to opt-in community members. G8 STRUCTURAL (the defining gate): relayOnly const true AND authoritativeSource required — sonae MUST NOT originate authoritative warnings, only faithfully relay them with attribution. Fabricating an authoritative alert is forbidden at the schema level.

relayOnly.description: G8 STRUCTURAL: const true — this record can ONLY relay an existing official warning; sonae never originates one

authoritativeSource.description: G8 STRUCTURAL: issuing authoritative agency (the warning's true author)

officialWarningId.description: The agency's own warning/bulletin identifier (provenance; verifiable upstream)

officialWarningUrl.description: Public permalink to the agency bulletin

severityVerbatim.description: Severity exactly as stated by the agency (e.g. 'Tsunami Warning', '大津波警報'); NOT re-graded by sonae

verbatimSummary.description: Faithful summary of the official text; no editorializing, no severity inflation/deflation

relayedToCommunitySiteIds.description: Opt-in community sites the relay was pushed to (community-scale; G3)

supersededByRelayUri.description: If a later official update supersedes this relay
